runTitle: Vercel Playwright QA - AI semantic routing regression check on v8.11.132
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_4abnPiNGVtn9Wj5ZYG9xton3DLc6 is Ready and aliased to https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version reports v8.11.132, commit d7ee00270cbf8f301950d390b7122bee8fd3b6a5, release tag v8.11.132, pipeline https://gitlab.com/skyasu2/openmanager-ai/-/pipelines/2517604435
Dashboard guest flow opened the AI sidebar with AI engine status Ready
Conversational AI QA Q1 overall status returned 18 total servers, 17 normal, 1 warning, and api-was-dc1-01 CPU 80%
Conversational AI QA Q2 web-server-01 detail returned CPU 23%, memory 41%, disk 29%
Conversational AI QA Q3 previous peak-load failure returned deterministic load1 24h peak at 2026-05-12 03:50 with value 16.58 and top servers
Conversational AI QA Q4 initially over-clarified because no server was named, but selecting whole-fleet returned no urgent server and one warning server api-was-dc1-01
Conversational AI QA Q5 context follow-up returned no network > 70% servers
Previous composite peak-plus-advice prompt now includes deterministic peak evidence, closing the missing-evidence portion of the v8.11.131 failure
Advice-only load phrasing now returns read-only diagnostic commands and explicitly warns that restart/delete/sysctl changes require approved procedure
Browser console reported 0 warnings and 0 errors; AI API network calls returned 200/201
skippedSurfaces: Core route pack beyond landing/dashboard AI sidebar was not repeated; this run targeted AI semantic routing after v8.11.132 deploy
Reporter Agent and Analyst Agent advanced surfaces
Mobile viewport and visual regression matrix
Cloud Run admin observability endpoints beyond deployment health already covered by tag pipeline smoke

aiLatencyObservations.surface: AI sidebar Q1 overall status summary
AI sidebar Q3 deterministic 24h peak-load evidence
AI sidebar composite peak plus advice prompt
AI sidebar advice-only read-only command guidance
AI sidebar whole-fleet load1 brittle phrasing failure

plannerShadowObservations.surface: Composite load peak plus response guidance question
plannerShadowObservations.source: v8.11.132 now attaches deterministic peak evidence to the composite prompt.

plannerShadowObservations.surface: Composite load peak plus response guidance safety envelope
plannerShadowObservations.source: The answer included sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y nginx without evidence or approval gate.
The prompt explicitly said no server name and whole system, but the response returned an empty-summary fallback.

expertAssessments.rationale: Standard conversational QA mostly passed and previous peak evidence drift is fixed, but two production prompts still fail: composite advice includes unsupported mutating commands, and a whole-fleet load1 phrasing returns an empty-summary fallback.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Add a safety envelope for composite advice answers and preserve whole_fleet metric_peak intent for explicit no-server load1 phrasings.

expertAssessments.rationale: Advice-only load guidance is now read-only, but the composite peak-plus-advice path still emitted sudo apt-get install -y nginx without evidence or approval gating.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Apply the read-only/mutating-command guard after any evidence-based final answer generation, not only in the command catalog path.

expertAssessments.rationale: The deterministic 24h peak load evidence is correct for canonical phrasing, but the explicit whole-fleet load1 phrasing did not resolve to the same evidence and returned an empty summary.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Normalize whole_fleet + load1 + peak/spike + since/yesterday phrasings into the same metric_peak frame before clarification.

expertAssessments.rationale: v8.11.132 is deployed on Vercel and Cloud Run, /api/version matches the release tag, the tag pipeline succeeded, and Vercel usage remains billed 0.0000 USD.
The run used Playwright MCP through the real UI path, recorded console/network/runtime evidence, and kept the live LLM prompt set targeted to the known risk.

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed before v8.11.132 targeted semantic routing QA; effective 6.7213 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 6090.

completedImprovements.title: Composite load peak plus response-guidance prompt should still use deterministic peak evidence
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.11.132 composite prompt included 2026-05-12 03:50 load1 peak, value 16.58, average 9.08, and top servers.

completedImprovements.title: Load advice responses should not propose mutating commands without a safety envelope for advice-only prompts
completedImprovements.evidence: Advice-only load prompt returned read-only top/ps commands and warned that restart/delete/sysctl changes require an approved procedure.

pendingImprovements.title: Composite peak-load advice answer must not emit unsupported mutating package-install commands
pendingImprovements.note: The composite prompt included deterministic peak evidence but then suggested sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y nginx, which is unrelated and mutating.

pendingImprovements.title: Whole-fleet load1 spike phrasing should route to metric_peak evidence instead of empty-summary fallback
pendingImprovements.note: The prompt explicitly said no server name and whole system, but production returned “응답 본문이 비어 있어...” rather than the known load1 peak evidence.

pendingImprovements.title: Whole-fleet action-needed question should not require a server name before answering
pendingImprovements.note: The standard Q4 “지금 당장 조치가 필요한 서버가 있어?” initially showed a missing-server clarification; selecting whole-fleet produced a valid answer.

notes: release decision: no-go for AI semantic routing quality until the two failed checks are fixed and rerun.
mode audit: mixed /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and /api/ai/jobs paths observed; no HTTP failures in captured AI network requests.
Q4 clarification was treated as a tracked UX/intent issue even though selecting whole-fleet produced a correct answer.
The screenshot captures the final empty-summary failure state in the AI sidebar.
